campaigns.subject: Quick website idea for {name}
campaigns.template:
Dear {name} Team,

I came across {business} online and was impressed with the work you do in the {business} industry. As a marketing agency, we help businesses like yours thrive in a competitive market.

To help you get the most out of your online presence, we'd like to offer you a complimentary website audit. This will give you a clear understanding of your website's strengths and weaknesses, and provide actionable insights to improve your online performance.

Would you be available for a 10-minute call to discuss further? We'd love to explore how we can help {business} grow and succeed.

Best regards, {sender}
